name: Alterra Power Corp.
description: Alterra Power Corp. was a leading global renewable energy developer, owner, and operator based in Vancouver, Canada. The company operated six power plants, including hydro, geothermal, and wind facilities, and held a portfolio of clean energy projects in Canada, the United States, and Iceland. In February 2018, Alterra Power Corp. was acquired by Innergex Renewable Energy Inc., which integrated Alterra's diverse renewable energy assets and development pipeline into its own extensive portfolio.
